title: STAT+: Bayer sues J&J over ‘false and misleading claims’ about competing prostate cancer treatments
description: Bayer sued rival Johnson & Johnson for launching a “false advertising campaign” based on flawed data to wrongfully promote its drug as more effective.
content: Bayer sued rival Johnson & Johnson for launching a “false advertising campaign” based on flawed data to wrongfully promote its drug as more effective.
